## Type of Change
<!-- Mark relevant items with an 'x' -->
- [ ] 🐛 Bug fix (non-breaking change which fixes an issue)
- [ ] ✨ New feature (non-breaking change which adds functionality)
- [ ] 📦 New dataset
- [ ] 📝 Documentation update
- [ ] 🔧 Code refactoring
- [ ] ⚠️ Breaking change (fix or feature that would cause existing functionality to not work as expected)

## Checklist
<!-- Mark completed items with an 'x' -->
- [ ] I have read the [CONTRIBUTING](docs/CONTRIBUTING.md) guidelines
- [ ] My code follows the style guidelines of this project
- [ ] I have performed a self-review of my code
- [ ] I have commented my code, particularly in hard-to-understand areas
- [ ] I have made corresponding changes to the documentation
- [ ] My changes generate no new warnings
- [ ] I have added tests that prove my fix is effective or that my feature works
- [ ] New and existing unit tests pass locally with my changes

## Dataset Checklist (if adding a dataset)
- [ ] Created `dataset_info.json` with required metadata
- [ ] Added entry to `datasets_catalog.csv`
- [ ] Updated `STATISTICS.md` if significant
- [ ] Added proper attribution in `docs/LICENSE_ATTRIBUTION.md`
- [ ] Created dataset-specific README.md
- [ ] Verified license allows redistribution (or provided links only)
